no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: >
  FEAT-014 and FEAT-016 already contain the explicit MET wiki links required by
  the bead scope: FEAT-014 links [[MET-001]] and [[MET-002]], and FEAT-016
  links [[MET-002]]. The remaining acceptance criterion, "ddx doc audit clean",
  is blocked by preexisting repo-wide doc-graph issues outside this bead's
  scope. Verification command `ddx doc audit` reports 86 integrity issues,
  including a cycle involving FEAT-002 -> FEAT-008 -> FEAT-013 -> FEAT-014 ->
  FEAT-016 -> FEAT-020 -> MET-002 -> SD-013 -> SD-019 -> FEAT-002, plus one
  missing dependency for helix.workflow.principles.
